title: Sagrada Família
description: Catenary geometry and ruled surfaces, form-found a century before the solver.
body: Gaudí form-found the nave through hanging-chain models — inverted catenaries giving compression-only geometry — and detailed the surfaces as hyperboloids, helicoids and other ruled geometries that masons could set out with straight lines.

Construction continues under a fully digital workflow: the surviving plaster models are scanned, rationalized parametrically and cut from stone by CNC — a century-old design being completed by the methods it anticipated.
